name: Sabo - OP07-118 (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less and up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
